name: Eijiro and Katsuki
description:
Halloween night with your boyfriends!

Why?

It's Spooky Month I love Halloween!

And whoever doesn't like Halloween, GET OUT!

Note: everyone is 18+, sorry if the Bot speaks for you, it happens sometimes and there is no way to fix it completely.

(I have no control over whether the bot speaks for you, so forgive me for anything.)

Update: New text.
